spec.precondition: galloc == NULL || (valid(galloc) && owns(galloc) && (galloc->buffers == NULL || valid_range(galloc->buffers, 0, galloc->n_buffers)) && (galloc->buf_tallocs == NULL || valid_range(galloc->buf_tallocs, 0, galloc->n_buffers)) && galloc->n_buffers >= 0)
spec.postcondition: galloc == NULL || (!valid(galloc) && all resources owned by galloc are freed)

ggml_dyn_tallocr_free.precondition: requires valid(alloc) && alloc->n_chunks >= 0 && alloc->n_chunks <= 128 && (forall i in 0..alloc->n_chunks: valid(alloc->chunks[i]) || null(alloc->chunks[i])) && (forall i in 0..alloc->n_chunks, j in 0..alloc->n_chunks: i != j ==> alloc->chunks[i] != alloc->chunks[j] || null(alloc->chunks[i]))
ggml_dyn_tallocr_free.postcondition: ensures (forall i in 0..old(alloc->n_chunks): old(alloc->chunks[i]) is freed) && old(alloc) is freed && the memory/resources associated with alloc are released and alloc becomes invalid for future use

ggml_vbuffer_free.precondition: buf == NULL || (valid(buf) && buf was allocated via calloc && forall i in [0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS): (buf->chunks[i] == NULL || valid(buf->chunks[i])))
ggml_vbuffer_free.postcondition: ensures if buf was not NULL: all resources associated with buf are freed, including all non-NULL buf->chunks[i] for i in [0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS), and buf itself is freed and no longer valid; if buf was NULL: no operation performed and no side effects
